items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step is blocked due to insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for channel preference per event type.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided does not include any concrete API endpoints or mechanisms that demonstrate how channel preferences are managed or validated for different event types. While the exploratory step aims to confirm the behavior of the scenario, the lack of specific details or mechanisms to verify this functionality leads to an inconclusive status. The prior steps indicate a pattern of insufficient evidence across related requirements, further supporting the blocked status.
